name: Neo Performance Materials Inc.
description: Neo Performance Materials Inc. is a global leader in the innovation and manufacturing of advanced industrial materials that serve as essential building blocks for modern, sustainable technologies. The company’s products, including rare earth magnets, specialty chemicals, and rare metals, are critical to enhancing energy efficiency, reducing emissions, and supporting industries such as automotive, electronics, and renewable energy. With a highly efficient manufacturing footprint across North America, Asia, and Europe, Neo is committed to sustainable practices and delivering innovative solutions that help drive the global transition toward a more carbon-neutral and environmentally friendly future.
